title: SDDEvidence
description: JSON Schema for Spec Kit Subagent-Driven Development (SDD) Verification Evidence

timestamp.description: UTC timestamp of the verification run

feature_name.description: The name of the feature being verified

commit_hash.description: The git commit hash at verification time

checklist.description: Checklist of requirements mapped to tests

verified_by.description: The test file/case that verifies the requirement (e.g. test_file.py::test_name)

test_output.description: Raw output from the test suite execution
